nasb.text: The beasts of the field will glorify Me, The jackals and the ostriches, Because I have given waters in the wilderness And rivers in the desert, To give drink to My chosen people.

esv.text: The wild beasts will honor me, the jackals and the ostriches, for I give water in the wilderness, rivers in the desert, to give drink to my chosen people,

cnv.text: 野地的走獸必尊重我， 野狗和鴕鳥也必這樣， 因為我使曠野有水， 使荒地有江河， 好使我揀選的子民有水喝，

ccb.text: 旷野的走兽必尊崇我， 其中有豺狼和鸵鸟， 因为我使旷野有甘泉， 使沙漠有江河， 供我拣选的子民饮用。

csbs.text: 野地的禽兽中，连豺狗和鸵鸟也必尊崇我， 因为我赐水给旷野， 赐河流给荒漠—— 这是为了给我拣选的百姓水喝。
